arts.ttl: Pep confidently declares: Man City will be back
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has confidently declared "Manchester City will be back" after a run of one win in 13 matches that has sent their season into turmoil.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola vows to ‘not give up’ amid Man City struggles
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says he has no intention of quitting as Man City manager amid their worst run of form during his eight-year tenure. The club have experienced an alarming slide this season after winning four Premier League titles on the bounce, as they sit seventh in the table. arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy speaks out on Man City slump ahead of Leicester City clash
arts.sum: City head to the King Power Stadium on a real slump which has seen them lose nine of their last 13 games in all competitions, so it could be a good time to face them. Van Nistelrooy knows only perfection will do against City, despite their opponents’ struggles.
